overview.description: Vietnam has 3 major telcos (Viettel, Vinaphone, Mobifone) serving 130M+ subscribers. AI use cases include network anomaly detection, churn prediction, customer service automation, and fraud detection.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$10B telecom revenue; 5G rollout accelerating; mobile-first population
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$80B regional telecom market; strong 5G investment driving AI in network ops

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Very high — billions of CDRs per day; continuous network telemetry streams
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: High — core billing and network systems well-structured and real-time

painPoints.problem: Network anomalies and outages are detected too slowly
Customer churn prediction models are outdated or rule-based
Call center volume is high; automation penetration is low
SIM swap fraud and account takeover are growing threats

relatedNodes.description: Telecom and cybersecurity overlap in network threat detection.
Telecom and finance share fraud detection and customer analytics patterns.
